title: Dropdown in item view settings not easy to use
excerpt:
Hi! 
During the development of a new item view, I noticed that the settings are not easy to use for users. 
Look at this: https://youtu.be/02bgI2vc3jA 
As is it the only field in the settings, you have to scroll twice…

posts.author: jeromeskiply (Jerome Chambard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
During the development of a new item view, I noticed that the settings are not easy to use for users.
Look at this: https://youtu.be/02bgI2vc3jA
As is it the only field in the settings, you have to scroll twice…

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jeromeskiply - thanks for sharing the video of that!

I’ve gone ahead and passed this feedback along internally to our development team to look into improving in the future. Let me know if there’s anything else I can assist with!

-Daniel
